title: BudgetAccount with transaction history
description: Implement a BudgetAccount that records transactions and derives its balance from them, giving a full audit trail.
requirements: BudgetAccount is created with a non-null, non-blank name and an opening balance (double >= 0)
addTransaction(Transaction t) records the transaction; throws IllegalArgumentException if t is null
getBalance() returns the opening balance plus all CREDITs minus all DEBITs
getTransactions() returns an unmodifiable list of all recorded transactions in insertion order
addTransaction throws IllegalStateException if a DEBIT would make the balance negative
toString() returns a readable summary, e.g. 'BudgetAccount[name=Savings, balance=1500.00, transactions=3]'
context: Package is com.teamtom, Java 21. Depends on Transaction (task-002). Follow the style of BankAccount.java already in the package.
